ab: Mamaca matamu ki qamutic sa asatu makucia ki qatu’, maqa tikulac ca asatu makucia ki haqo mucqut, mopata a mamangtuk.
ch: A:老鼠應該要⽤⽯壓式陷阱抓，⽵雞應該要⽤套頸式陷阱抓，這樣才對。
en: It is correct to catch mice through rangay and catch bamboo partridges through qjiulang.

ab: Mopataqana, muliva qana cak, banaqa ni cak udamuan.
ch: B:原來是這樣，我都搞錯了！難怪我都抓不到。
en: No wonder! I am mistaken and that’s why I cannot catch any of them.

ab: Na moqnang cak taqo su tu makuqa’ matac’i tusa haqo ti.
ch: A:那我再教你怎麼製作這兩種陷阱。
en: Then I will teach you how to set up these two traps.

ab: Machal maca mopata! Na utamuanin cak sikupa tu tesmumut maca qabasing.
ch: B:這樣子太棒了！這樣我以後就會抓到獵物了。
en: Great! I will be able to catch the prey in the future.

ab: Masmutin sala qa qoma, munhana sukuta siza i kaul, na munha’an ata qomata.
ch: A:田裡的草已經雜草叢生了，你去倉庫拿鐮刀，我們去田裡。
en: The grass in the fields is too tall. Go to the warehouse to take the sickle and let’s go to the fields.

ab: Icak qa kaul?
ch: B:鐮刀放在哪裡?
en: Where are the sickles?

ab: Hani qapung tu siki a, maca munkunbu asu suku na usatu’anin.
ch: A:在圓簍的旁邊，你進去倉庫就會看到了。
en: It is next to the round basket. You will see it when you enter the warehouse.

ab: Mananulu ki siza, manucqet ta kaul, sadu’du na milulu.
ch: A:小心拿，鐮刀很利，小心不要受傷。
en: Be careful and don’t get hurt. The sickle is very sharp.

ab: Qa’a tu kandapan inak tu haqo!
ch: A:不要踩到我的陷阱!
en: Don’t step on my trap!

ab: I’icaq qa sintac’i su tu haqo?
ch: B:你做的陷阱在哪裡?
en: Where is your trap?

ab: Manak haqo qa iha’an nastu teza tu lukic.
ch: A:我的陷阱在那棵樹的下面。
en: My trap is under that tree.

ab: Mavia casu tu nitu minpungli?
ch: B:你怎麼會記得?
en: How do you remember?

ab: Heza’ nak sintas’i pasqu iti, pangqa qanciap cak tu icaqa nak ka haqu.
ch: A:我在這邊有做記號，因此我知道我的陷阱在哪裡。
en: I make a mark here, so I know where my trap is.

ab: Maqa di ka saluzu’ ina munhan ata vanglazta valu’iskan.
ch: A:這是魚籠，我們去溪邊捕魚。
en: This is a fish trap which we put beside the river for fishing.

ab: Uka nam idi saluzu’, amin cam makucia ki paniza’ damu iskan.
ch: B:我們那邊沒有魚筌，我們都用釣竿抓魚。
en: We don’t have any fish traps there, so we catch fish with a fishing rod.

ab: Ni’ang cak mekucia ki paniza’, maqatu asu masnava zaku maca moqnin?
ch: A:我沒有用過釣竿，你下次教我好嗎?
en: I have never used a fishing rod before, would you mind teaching me next time?

ab: U, maca moqnin na muckun cata malasqan.
ch: B:好啊!我們下次一起去釣魚。
en: Sure! Let’s go fishing together next time.

ab: Maca moqnin na masnava cak sutu makuqa’ matas’i saluzu’.
ch: A:那我下次教你做魚筌。
en: I will teach you how to make a fish trap next time.

ab: Bicukbicukin su a paniza’, doqe hezin na iskan kalat! kavavain sibutbut paniza’ su.
ch: A:你的釣竿動了，是不是有魚上鉤了!你快拉釣竿起來。
en: Your fishing rod is moving. Isn’t the fish on the hook? Pull it up!

ab: Mal’uang, mastan na qatu’ vindoqvindoq. I’id cak sibutbut ti paniza’, sepa casu deza kadangaz zaku siza’ i ami’.
ch: B:等等，船太晃了。我在這邊拉釣竿，你去那邊幫我拿網子來。
en: Wait, the ship is rolling heavily. I am here to pull the fishing rod and you should go there to grab me the net.

ab: Silulu’ i su a iskan sepa zaku’an di. Na kadangazku asu sibutbut.
ch: A:你把魚拉到我這邊。我幫妳拉起來。
en: Pull the fish to my side and I will help you pull it up.

ab: Tutuza macihal! Mastan’in haip pa sinlaskan, makmuzin na kalala’.
ch: A:太好了!今天大豐收，魚簍都裝滿了。
en: Great! It is a bumper crop today with full fish baskets.

ab: Ina kava cata mucoqes paqosli cikopa tu tec’an.
ch: B:我們快回去和大家分享。
en: Let’s go back immediately and share it with everyone.
